command:
cat << 'EOF' > test_perf.py
import subprocess
import time
def run_test():
    start = time.time()
    subprocess.run(["cargo", "test", "-p", "tokmd-analysis"], capture_output=True)
    end = time.time()
    print(f"Test run took {end - start:.2f} seconds")
run_test()
EOF
python3 test_perf.py
